nodes.name: config.rs
nodes.summary: Configuration types for attention-weighted coherence including AttentionCoherenceConfig and AttentionMode enum (Stable/Cautious/Freeze).

nodes.name: AttentionCoherenceConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration struct holding dimension, k-neighbors, temperature, topology gating thresholds, MoE and diffusion parameters.

nodes.name: AttentionMode
nodes.summary: Three-mode attention state (Stable, Cautious, Freeze) derived from coherence score.

nodes.name: diffusion.rs
nodes.summary: PDE heat-diffusion smoother that propagates energy across the coherence graph using a Laplacian-like kernel.

nodes.name: SmoothedEnergy
nodes.summary: Result of diffusion smoothing with per-node/edge energies, totals, convergence flag.

nodes.name: DiffusionSmoothing
nodes.summary: Heat-equation smoother that builds a similarity-weighted Laplacian and iterates fixed-step diffusion.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Attention module barrel exposing AttentionCoherence engine that combines topology gating, MoE routing, and diffusion smoothing.

nodes.name: AttentionCoherence
nodes.summary: Top-level engine wrapping adapter, topology gate, MoE processor, and diffusion smoother for attention-weighted coherence.

nodes.name: AttentionError
nodes.summary: Error variants for attention operations: dimension mismatch, empty input, invalid config, computation failure.

nodes.name: WeightedEdgeResidual
nodes.summary: Edge residual weighted by endpoint attention scores with norm-squared and weighted-energy fields.

nodes.name: AttentionEnergyAnalysis
nodes.summary: Aggregated result of attention-weighted energy analysis with optional diffusion-smoothed energy and gate result.

nodes.name: moe.rs
nodes.summary: Mixture-of-Experts residual processor with top-k routing and load-balance loss.

nodes.name: ExpertRouting
nodes.summary: Routing decision capturing selected expert indices, softmax weights, and pre-top-k logits.

nodes.name: MoEResidualProcessor
nodes.summary: MoE processor with per-expert linear params, router, and top-k softmax dispatch over specializations.

nodes.name: topology.rs
nodes.summary: Topology-gated attention controller deriving mode (Stable/Cautious/Freeze) from key-state coherence metrics.

nodes.name: AttentionScore
nodes.summary: Per-node attention score with coherence contribution.

nodes.name: TopologyGateResult
nodes.summary: Snapshot of the gate's coherence value, current mode, effective width, and update permission.

nodes.name: TopologyGate
nodes.summary: Stateful gate that recomputes coherence from k-NN similarity over keys and exposes mode and width.

nodes.name: energy.rs
nodes.summary: Value objects for sheaf-Laplacian coherence energy (edge, scope, global) plus SIMD-aware norm/residual kernels.

nodes.name: EdgeEnergy
nodes.summary: Per-edge weighted residual energy storing residual vector, squared norm, weight, and source/target.

nodes.name: ScopeEnergy
nodes.summary: Aggregated energy for a scope with count, average, max, and hotspot edge id.

nodes.name: HotspotInfo
nodes.summary: Ranked hotspot info with edge id, energy, source/target, rank, and percentage of total.

nodes.name: EnergySnapshot
nodes.summary: Timestamped fingerprinted snapshot of total energy for staleness detection.

nodes.name: CoherenceEnergy
nodes.summary: Global coherence energy E(S)=sum(w_e*|r_e|^2) with edge map, scope map, fingerprint, and statistics.

nodes.name: EnergyStatistics
nodes.summary: Statistical summary (min, max, mean, median, std-dev, count) of edge energies.

nodes.name: engine.rs
nodes.summary: CoherenceEngine aggregate maintaining sheaf graph (DashMap-backed nodes/edges) with parallel/SIMD energy computation and residual cache.

nodes.name: CoherenceConfig
nodes.summary: Engine config: default edge weight, parallel threshold, cache toggle, default dimension.

nodes.name: CoherenceError
nodes.summary: Error variants for missing nodes/edges, duplicates, dimension mismatch, invalid restriction maps.

nodes.name: NodeState
nodes.summary: Versioned, scoped node state vector with metadata and timestamp.

nodes.name: SheafNode
nodes.summary: Sheaf node wrapping NodeState with its incident edge ids.

nodes.name: RestrictionMap
nodes.summary: Linear restriction map y=Ax+b with identity/projection/random constructors and SIMD-aware apply.

nodes.name: SheafEdge
nodes.summary: Edge with source/target restriction maps, weight, scope, and zero-alloc weighted-residual energy computation.

nodes.name: CoherenceEngine
nodes.summary: Thread-safe aggregate computing global coherence energy with fingerprint-based caching, parallel rayon path, and residual cache.

nodes.name: history.rs
nodes.summary: Time-series energy tracker with rolling window, linear-regression trend, z-score anomaly detection, and persistence checks.

nodes.name: EnergyHistoryConfig
nodes.summary: Config for max entries, trend window, persistence window, anomaly sigma.

nodes.name: TrendDirection
nodes.summary: Trend classification: Increasing, Decreasing, Stable, Unknown.

nodes.name: EnergyTrend
nodes.summary: Trend result with direction, slope, R-squared, window mean/std-dev.

nodes.name: EnergyHistory
nodes.summary: VecDeque-backed history with running sums for O(1) mean/variance and on-the-fly anomaly detection.

nodes.name: incremental.rs
nodes.summary: Incremental coherence engine that recomputes only edges affected by dirty nodes, switching to full recompute past a ratio threshold.

nodes.name: IncrementalConfig
nodes.summary: Config controlling incremental mode, full-recompute threshold, batching, and history tracking.

nodes.name: DeltaResult
nodes.summary: Result of incremental compute with energy delta, edge counts, and timing.

nodes.name: UpdateEvent
nodes.summary: Update events: NodeUpdated/Added/Removed, EdgeAdded/Removed with timestamps and affected sets.

nodes.name: IncrementalCache
nodes.summary: Cache of edge energies and residuals with dirty-edge tracking and fingerprint validation.

nodes.name: IncrementalEngine
nodes.summary: Engine wrapping a CoherenceEngine reference; performs dirty-tracked incremental recomputes with parallel path.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Coherence module barrel re-exporting energy, engine, history, incremental, and spectral components.

nodes.name: spectral.rs
nodes.summary: Spectral drift detector using sheaf-Laplacian eigenvalues, EMA smoothing, severity classification, and power-iteration fallback.

nodes.name: SpectralConfig
nodes.summary: Config for number of eigenvalues, history size, drift/severe thresholds, and EMA alpha.

nodes.name: DriftSeverity
nodes.summary: Severity tiers: Minor, Moderate, Severe, Critical with numeric level and escalation flag.

nodes.name: DriftEvent
nodes.summary: Detected drift event with magnitude, severity, affected modes, connectivity/spectral-gap change, description.

nodes.name: SpectralAnalyzer
nodes.summary: Records eigenvalue snapshots, maintains EMA, detects drift via relative L2 spectral distance and connectivity loss.

nodes.name: SpectralStats
nodes.summary: Aggregate spectral statistics for the analyzer including drift count and current connectivity/gap.

nodes.name: compute_eigenvalues
nodes.summary: Computes top-k eigenvalues of a symmetric Laplacian; power-iteration fallback or nalgebra under the `spectral` feature.

nodes.name: cocycle.rs
nodes.summary: Cocycle and coboundary operations for cohomology with builder and sheaf-aware variants.

nodes.name: Cocycle
nodes.summary: Cochain in the kernel of the coboundary operator.

nodes.name: Coboundary
nodes.summary: Coboundary operator delta on cochains.

nodes.name: CocycleBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder for assembling cocycles incrementally.

nodes.name: SheafCocycle
nodes.summary: Sheaf-aware cocycle leveraging restriction maps.

nodes.name: SheafCoboundary
nodes.summary: Sheaf coboundary operator parameterised by sheaf reference.

nodes.name: cohomology_group.rs
nodes.summary: Computes cohomology groups H^n(K,F), Betti numbers, and harmonic representatives via linear algebra.

nodes.name: CohomologyConfig
nodes.summary: Config for cohomology computation tolerances and dimension caps.

nodes.name: BettiNumbers
nodes.summary: Sequence of Betti numbers b_n = dim H^n.

nodes.name: CohomologyGroup
nodes.summary: Representation of H^n with rank, generators, and quotient structure.

nodes.name: CohomologyComputer
nodes.summary: Computes ker/img of coboundary maps to extract cohomology groups and Betti numbers.

nodes.name: diffusion.rs
nodes.summary: Sheaf diffusion combined with cohomological obstruction indicators to surface global inconsistencies.

nodes.name: SheafDiffusionConfig
nodes.summary: Config for sheaf-diffusion time step, iteration count, and obstruction blending.

nodes.name: ObstructionIndicator
nodes.summary: Per-region obstruction indicator with severity.

nodes.name: DiffusionResult
nodes.summary: Diffusion outcome bundling smoothed section, residuals, and obstruction indicators.

nodes.name: SheafDiffusion
nodes.summary: Runs heat-equation diffusion against a sheaf Laplacian and emits obstruction reports.

nodes.name: laplacian.rs
nodes.summary: Sheaf Laplacian L_F = delta* delta with spectrum analysis and harmonic representatives.

nodes.name: LaplacianConfig
nodes.summary: Config for Laplacian solver tolerances, regularization, and degree count.

nodes.name: LaplacianSpectrum
nodes.summary: Eigenvalue/eigenvector spectrum of the sheaf Laplacian.

nodes.name: HarmonicRepresentative
nodes.summary: Harmonic cochain representative living in the kernel of L_F.

nodes.name: SheafLaplacian
nodes.summary: Builds and operates on the sheaf Laplacian, returning spectra and harmonic representatives.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Cohomology submodule barrel exposing simplicial, sheaf, laplacian, cocycle, obstruction, diffusion, and neural primitives.

nodes.name: neural.rs
nodes.summary: Sheaf neural network layers (convolution, pooling) and activations that respect sheaf structure.

nodes.name: Activation
nodes.summary: Activation functions usable in sheaf neural layers.

nodes.name: SheafNeuralConfig
nodes.summary: Hyperparameters for sheaf-aware neural layers.

nodes.name: SheafNeuralLayer
nodes.summary: Single neural layer operating on sheaf sections via the sheaf Laplacian.

nodes.name: SheafConvolution
nodes.summary: Convolutional aggregator over sheaf neighborhoods.

nodes.name: CohomologyPooling
nodes.summary: Pooling operator that aggregates cohomology-aware features.

nodes.name: PoolingMethod
nodes.summary: Pooling strategies (mean, max, attention) for cohomology pooling.

nodes.name: obstruction.rs
nodes.summary: Obstruction detection identifying non-trivial cohomology classes that prevent global patching.

nodes.name: ObstructionSeverity
nodes.summary: Severity tiers for cohomological obstructions.

nodes.name: Obstruction
nodes.summary: An individual obstruction localized to a region with magnitude and severity.

nodes.name: ObstructionReport
nodes.summary: Aggregated report of detected obstructions.

nodes.name: ObstructionDetector
nodes.summary: Detects obstructions via harmonic representatives and coboundary residuals.

nodes.name: sheaf.rs
nodes.summary: Sheaf data structure assigning stalks to vertices with restriction maps and section assembly.

nodes.name: Stalk
nodes.summary: Vector space attached to a single node.

nodes.name: LocalSection
nodes.summary: Local section assigning a value in a stalk to a node.

nodes.name: SheafSection
nodes.summary: Global assembly of local sections across nodes.

nodes.name: Sheaf
nodes.summary: Sheaf over a SheafGraph: stalks, restriction maps, and section operations.

nodes.name: SheafBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder pattern for constructing sheaves with custom stalks and restriction functions.

nodes.name: simplex.rs
nodes.summary: Simplicial complex and chain/cochain types underpinning cohomology computations.

nodes.name: SimplexId
nodes.summary: Newtype u64 identifier for a simplex.

nodes.name: Simplex
nodes.summary: An n-simplex stored as a sorted set of vertices with orientation.

nodes.name: SimplicialComplex
nodes.summary: Indexed collection of simplices closed under face operations.

nodes.name: Chain
nodes.summary: Formal linear combination of simplices (chain group element).

nodes.name: Cochain
nodes.summary: Dual to Chain: assigns a value to each simplex of given dimension.

nodes.name: adapter.rs
nodes.summary: Adapter wrapping ruvector-raft for replicating coherence state across cluster nodes.

nodes.name: CoherenceCommand
nodes.summary: Raft-replicated commands for mutating distributed coherence state.

nodes.name: CommandResult
nodes.summary: Result of applying a CoherenceCommand through Raft.

nodes.name: RaftAdapter
nodes.summary: Wraps a Raft node to expose coherence-state operations and leadership signals.

nodes.name: ClusterStatus
nodes.summary: Snapshot of cluster membership, leader, and term.

nodes.name: config.rs
nodes.summary: Configuration for Raft-based distributed coherence including NodeRole and cluster settings.

nodes.name: DistributedCoherenceConfig
nodes.summary: Config for distributed coherence: node id, peers, election timeouts, snapshotting.

nodes.name: NodeRole
nodes.summary: Cluster role enum (Leader, Follower, Candidate, Learner).
